landing.heroSubtitle: Join a savings circle with people like you. Contribute monthly, receive a full lump sum when it's your turn. Safe, structured, and fully automated.
landing.frameworkTitle: Savings circles, without the hassle of finding people.
landing.frameworkSubtitle: The savings circle your community has always done, now digital, automatic, and open to everyone across the Middle East.
landing.step1Body: Tell us your name and monthly income. We use this to make sure your commitments stay manageable.
landing.step2Body: Browse circles that fit your budget. Each one shows the monthly amount and when you get paid out.
landing.step3Body: We check that your monthly payments never exceed 40% of your income, so you're always comfortable.
landing.step4Body: Every month, one member gets the full pot. When your turn comes, it goes straight to your wallet.
landing.platformTitle: A platform built for trusted community finance
landing.platformBody: HalqaPay gives every member a clear view of monthly obligations, payout order, and wallet activity. Our product combines familiar savings traditions with clear digital controls to reduce confusion and increase confidence.

approach.title: Our approach
approach.transparencyBody: Before joining, members can view contributions, duration, and eligibility outcomes in plain language.
approach.eligibilityBody: Capacity checks are designed to help members avoid over-commitment and keep payments manageable.
approach.automationBody: Monthly collection and payout workflows are automated and traceable from your dashboard.

rights.title: Terms, rights, and member protection
rights.subtitle: We make platform rules explicit so members understand responsibilities and protections before joining any circle.
rights.item1: You can review terms and privacy information at any time before or after account creation.
rights.item2: You keep visibility into your wallet activity, transaction history, and circle participation status.
rights.item3: Platform access may be restricted for misuse or fraud to protect all members.

circles.title: Open circles
circles.subtitle: Find a circle that fits your monthly budget and savings goal.
circles.empty: No open circles at the moment. Check back soon or start your own.

joinModal.title: Join this circle
joinModal.checking: Checking if this fits your budget…
joinModal.approved: Great news — you can join this circle.
joinModal.rejected: This circle exceeds your safe monthly limit.
joinModal.suggestedDuration: Minimum circle length you'd qualify for:
joinModal.totalBurden: Your total monthly payments after joining:
joinModal.needMonths: To join comfortably, this circle needs to run for at least {{count}} months.
joinModal.tryMonths: Try a circle that runs at least {{count}} months, or reduce your current commitments first.
joinModal.notApproved: You are not eligible to join this circle right now.

dashboard.title: My dashboard
dashboard.capacityHint: We keep your total circle payments below 40% of your income so you're never stretched thin.
dashboard.activeEmpty: You haven't joined any circles yet. Browse available circles and start saving today.
dashboard.payoutSlot: You are Participant #{{n}} in the payout rotation
dashboard.payoutManaged: All payouts are handled automatically by HalqaPay

topUp.title: Add funds
topUp.hint: Instantly top up your wallet in {{currency}}.

createCircle.title: Start a new circle
createCircle.subtitle: Set the total savings amount, how many months it runs, and how many people can join.
createCircle.name: Circle name
createCircle.invalidTotal: Please enter a valid savings amount.
createCircle.invalidDuration: Duration must be at least 1 month.

transactions.title: Payment history
transactions.subtitle: A full record of everything that has moved in and out of your wallet.
transactions.empty: Nothing here yet. Top up your wallet or join a circle to get started.

admin.title: Demo controls
admin.subtitle: Simulate the monthly cycle or reset demo data. Use this to show judges the full savings circle lifecycle.
admin.activeHelp: Each row shows how many months have passed in a circle. Advance the month to trigger contributions and a payout.
admin.emptyActive: No active circles found. Reset demo data to generate some.

common.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

footer.tagline: Trusted savings circles, built for communities across the Middle East.

howItWorks.title: How HalqaPay works
howItWorks.subtitle: A simple four-step process to join a trusted savings circle and receive payouts on time.
howItWorks.step1: Create your account and complete your profile details.
howItWorks.step2: Choose a circle that matches your monthly budget.
howItWorks.step3: Join, contribute monthly, and track all commitments from your dashboard.
howItWorks.step4: Receive your payout in your wallet when your rotation slot arrives.

about.title: About HalqaPay
about.body: HalqaPay modernizes trusted community savings circles with transparent automation, clear monthly obligations, and a mobile-first experience for the Middle East.

cards.securityBody: Secure auth, wallet visibility, and clear transaction records keep members informed at every step.
cards.fairnessBody: Circle rules and payout order are explicit, so members know exactly when they will receive funds.
cards.regionalBody: Arabic-first UX, local currency support, and familiar savings behavior tailored for local communities.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.subtitle: Need support or have product feedback? Our team is here to help.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.body:
We only collect personal data required to operate your account and savings circles.

Your account information is used for authentication, eligibility checks, and account support.

We do not sell your personal data to third parties.

If you need account data changes or deletion support, contact our support team.

terms.title: Terms of use
terms.body:
By using HalqaPay, you agree to provide accurate profile information and maintain account security.

Circle commitments are your responsibility and should match your financial capacity.

HalqaPay may limit or suspend access for misuse, abuse, or fraudulent behavior.

Service details may evolve as we improve product reliability and compliance.
